expectations.text: want preserves user outcome-shape (attach a receipt)

expectations.evidence: all 4 user bullets verbatim in zettel.md

expectations.text: Response flags AC as solution-shaped — does not silently accept

expectations.text: Original wording preserved in file (user must consent before rewrite)
